overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian industrial outskirts area in Cyberpunk 2077 at dusk. The camera moves from beneath an elevated highway past abandoned structures toward massive satellite dish installations on the horizon, illuminated by streetlights against a deep blue twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service road beneath elevated highway

events.description: passing a burning barrel emitting orange light on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large concrete and steel overpass structure casting shadows overhead
green industrial building with corporate logo and metal siding
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge
large red industrial barrels clustered near the barrier
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and hanging wires
massive satellite dish structures visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in an industrial zone. The path is lined with red and white concrete barriers and industrial barrels. A green warehouse building stands to the right, while massive satellite dishes are barely visible in the far distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open roadside transitioning to desert outskirts

events.description: exiting the covered highway underpass into open twilight environment
ground surface transitions from concrete sidewalk to dirt and sparse grass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road edge as the environment opens up to reveal the distant satellite structures

entered.detail: illuminated streetlight casting a warm glow on the pavement
distant city buildings visible on the horizon against the twilight sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into open air at dusk. The camera passes an illuminated streetlight as the concrete sidewalk gives way to dirt and sparse vegetation. The massive satellite dishes become more prominent on the horizon, while a distant city skyline is visible to the right.

events.description: slight rightward drift as the path curves along the road edge
passing scattered trash and debris littered across the dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt verge parallel to the asphalt road, approaching the large satellite installations

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dirt roadside through a desolate area scattered with debris. The satellite dish structures grow larger in the center of view as the camera approaches. Streetlights and utility poles pass by on the right, while sparse desert vegetation lines the path.

events.description: slight leftward turn following the curve of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the massive satellite dish structure now dominating the center of the view

segments.scene_description: Approaching the massive satellite dish installation in the deepening twilight. The structures now dominate the center of the frame, silhouetted against the dark blue sky. The road curves gently left as streetlights and utility poles recede to the right, leaving the path open toward the futuristic installation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an industrial overpass toward a towering satellite installation under a deepening twilight sky. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, passing red and white concrete barriers and a green warehouse while the distant dishes remain barely visible. As the camera emerges from under the overpass into the open air, the concrete sidewalk gives way to dirt and sparse vegetation, revealing a distant city skyline to the right. The scene then shifts into a desolate roadside stretch scattered with debris, where the satellite structures grow increasingly prominent in the center of the frame. Finally, the path curves gently left as the streetlights recede, leaving the massive, silhouetted installations to dominate the horizon against a dark blue sky.
